cases.name: apply-naming side-effect contract
cases.description: ha-apply-naming is explicitly locked to manual invocation for side effects.

cases.name: deploy validation gate is non-bypassable
cases.description: Deploy path must keep validation blocking and avoid bypass flags.

checks.contains: Validation failures are blocking. Do NOT offer a skip/bypass path.

cases.name: deploy push target contract
cases.description: Deploy must resolve push target from settings and avoid hardcoded origin/main.

cases.name: runtime breadcrumb artifacts ignored
cases.description: Session breadcrumb files must be ignored to prevent noisy machine-specific commits.

cases.name: canonical invariant source declares eight
cases.description: Safety invariant source of truth must explicitly declare eight invariants.

checks.contains: This file is the canonical source of truth for invariant count and wording.

cases.name: apply-naming mutation tool contract
cases.description: ha-apply-naming keeps manual invocation but can perform the edits its workflow requires.

checks.contains: allowed-tools: Read, Write, Edit, Bash, Glob, Grep, AskUserQuestion

cases.name: onboard settings persistence contract
cases.description: ha-onboard can write the settings file it documents.

checks.contains: allowed-tools: Read, Write, Edit, Bash, AskUserQuestion, Glob, Grep

cases.name: troubleshooting helper execution contract
cases.description: ha-troubleshooting can invoke the Python helper used for traces.

cases.name: env-guard blocks hass-cli raw ws
cases.description: PreToolUse hook must block hass-cli raw ws commands (broken on HA 2026.2+).

cases.name: duplicate id capability half
cases.description: Harness should keep this capability case distinct from the regression case with the same id.
